title: TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM - 211info
text: JOSEPHINE COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH GRANTS PASS TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Identifies and treats tuberculosis (TB) disease. Screens tuberculosis case contacts and provides medical case management for those who test positive. 715 NW Dimmick Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Tuesday 9am-noon and 1pm-3:30pm Email (541) 474-5325 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 474-5325 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Varies by service. Insurance will be billed if applicable DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Josephine County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-5:45pm, Friday 8am-noon Closed 8am-noon on the first Tuesday of each month TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the corner of NW Dimmick and NW A Street Services: Case/Care Management * Tuberculosis Tuberculosis Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC HEALTH - COMMUNICABLE DISEASE PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
